plugins.name: HREVN AER Verifier
plugins.description: Verify, inspect and summarize HREVN Agent Evaluation Record (AER) bundles. Gives AI agents structured, verifiable evidence to inspect, justify and reason over — reducing hallucination on document-heavy compliance tasks.
plugins.author: HREVN
use_cases: Verify integrity of an AER bundle before AI reasoning
Inspect bundle metadata in compliance workflows
List evidence artifacts with hashes for audit trails
Generate executive summary of AER packages
